since_last: 35% of 100 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +0.35%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 35% of AI names green
cards.body: BTC -0.07% · Gold -0.55% · Nasdaq100 +0.33%. 35% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +0.35%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +0.35%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -2.25%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at -5.16%
cards.body: Leaders: NOW +1.10%, TTD +1.02%, ADBE +0.97%, SO +0.93%, PINS +0.89%. Laggards: MU -5.16%, POWL -3.48%, AMAT -3.44%, LRCX -3.29%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.15% at $143.62
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.15% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
